stonetop.summary: Two mute ghost-children who haunt the Stream, mouthing silent warnings.

system.concept: Two mute ghost-children who haunt the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.KJUzuYlurcjPxHd7]{Stream}, mouthing silent warnings.
system.description: A pair of ghostly children who haunt the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.KJUzuYlurcjPxHd7]{Stream}, a few minutes from @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.6yScslDfqrcCQ6CJ]{Stonetop} near the base of the bluff. Sightings are uncommon, but common enough. They watch what happens at the water — seen or unseen — and manifest in silent terror, mouthing and gesturing at some danger, real or not.
